name: Decatur County Family Ymca
description: Come play pickleball at Decatur County Family Ymca in Greensburg, IN! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Decatur County Parks and Recreation
description: Decatur County Parks and Recreation is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Greensburg, IN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. Reservations are not available.

name: Rebekah Park
description: Rebekah Park is a place to play pickleball in Greensburg, IN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
